subject: Fermi GBM trigger 180604900/549840956 likely not a GRB
body:
R. Hamburg (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:


"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 180604900/549840956

at 21:35:51.14 UT on 04 June 2018, was tentatively classified as a GRB.

However this trigger is likely due to a statistical fluctuation."
